assertions.text: The agent uses yt-dlp to fetch the YouTube transcript.
The agent converts the transcript into a SimonKWiki page via wiki ingest.
The slash command invokes the notebooklm import workflow.
The agent can handle YouTube transcripts, PDFs, and web pages as input.
The agent fetches the video transcript and ingests it into SimonKWiki.
The agent uses defuddle for web pages when importing source material.
